MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Leona Luckett.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Glover is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated.
